featured.name: CNSC CODEX MAIN
featured.desc: A centralized MERN platform deployed in production, used by multiple student service offices at CNSC to manage organization files, events, and violation records. Built with annual data reset cycles aligned to the academic year.

cards.name: TODOEASE
cards.desc: Multi-user task manager with full CRUD, account authentication, and role-based access. Admins manage tasks across all users.

cards.name: CNPENRO FILE TRACKER
cards.desc: Web-based file management system for the Provincial Environment and Natural Resources Office. Digitizes manual records for centralized government document storage.
